Package dev.jeka.core.api.tooling.intellij

Class JkIntelliJImlGenerator

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.tooling.intellij.JkIntelliJImlGenerator
public final class JkIntelliJImlGenerator extends Object
Provides method to generate and read Eclipse metadata files.
